(the birth) is called· 'Garbha Srava'; for 5th and 6th month
(i.e. till27 x 6 = 162 days) it is called 'Garbha pata'; from 7th
to lOth month (i.e. till27 x 10 = 270 days) it is called 'Prasuti';
and in the lOth' month (i.e. from 270 onwards) it is called
'Sutakam']
Thus it should be noted that the above quote on 'Prasuti'
(breaking of plasenta) for birth time determination applies,
only to untimely births that happen between 162 days to 270
days; and not for timely births that occur after 270 days.
Astrology is an ancient advice, and therefore more than
our logic the words of the sages should be given prime
preference. Even Mihira says -
